title: Cleanup: Menu Preview Polish, Bot Control Removal, Arrow-Key Scroll Fix
content:
## Overview

Four cleanup items landed together on `chores/cleanup-bugs`:

1. **Landing-page preview parity** — the auto-playing menu demo now renders head/tail graphics, random bots with a corner label, and Iron Snake boards.
2. **"Disable Bot" button removed** — the mid-game bot toggle (button + `B` shortcut) was vestigial and has been deleted.
3. **Mid-game bot switching removed** — the in-game bot selector dropdown has been deleted; bot selection is now exclusively a pre-game action.
4. **Arrow-key scroll fix** — arrow keys no longer scroll the page while playing.

---

## Task 1 — Landing-Page Preview Polish (`src/menu-demo.ts`, `index.html`, `src/style.css`)

### Head & tail graphics

The demo previously drew the snake as plain identical blocks. It now matches the real game:

- **`drawPrism(corners, bh, top, right, left)`** — shared extrusion helper extracted so both standard body blocks and the tapered tail reuse the same drawing path.
- **`drawSnakeHead(gx, gy, colors, dir)`** — taller block (`HEAD_HEIGHT_SCALE = 1.6`) with two eyes on the leading face.
- **`drawSnakeTail(gx, gy, colors, awayDir)`** — tapered prism pointing in the trailing direction, using `TAIL_HEIGHT_SCALE = 0.7`.
- Segment classification in `draw()`: `index === 0 → head`, `index === len-1 → tail` (omitted for a length-1 snake), else `body`.
- Color tuples match the real game: head `['#4ade80','#22c55e','#16a34a']`, body `['#22c55e','#16a34a','#15803d']`, food `['#ef4444','#dc2626','#b91c1c']`.

### Iron Snake board support

- `generateIronSnakeBoard` is imported from `./iron-snake`; a `boardMask: Uint8Array | null` field tracks the current board shape.
- `onBoard(x, y)` checks rectangle bounds and, when a mask is set, `boardMask[y*gridSize+x] === 1`. `inBounds` delegates to `onBoard`, so bot pathfinding, collision, and food spawning all respect the irregular shape automatically.
- **Board type is decided once per page load** (not per life). Iron vs. classic is committed at page load so a given visit consistently showcases one style; reloading may show the other. A fresh board is generated on every life reset.
- `DEMO_GRID_SIZE` is bumped to ~14 to give irregular shapes room (Iron Snake `MIN_GRID` is 12).
- The starting cell is placed at the on-board cell nearest center (center may be void on an irregular board).
- `spawnFood()` only considers on-board empty cells.
- `drawGroundPlane`, `drawGridLines`, and `drawGroundBorder` all have masked branches that skip off-board cells and trace the true irregular outline, matching the authentic carved look of the real game.

### Random bot + corner label

- On every life reset, a bot is chosen at random from `AVAILABLE_BOTS` (replaces the fixed `DEFAULT_BOT_ID`).
- A `<div id="menu-demo-bot-label" class="menu-demo-bot-label">` element was added to `index.html` inside `.menu-hero`.
- Styled in `src/style.css` as a small translucent dark pill with a green border, absolutely positioned in the top-left corner of the hero container (DOM overlay, not canvas-rendered, so text is crisp at all resolutions and accessible).
- `MenuDemo` queries the element once in the constructor and updates its text (e.g. `Bot: <name>`) in `resetSnake()`.

---

## Task 2 — "Disable Bot" Button Removed (`index.html`, `src/main.ts`)

The `#toggle-bot` button and its `B` keyboard shortcut toggled the bot on/off mid-game — a mode nobody uses now that bot play lives in the "Solo Bot" pre-game menu.

**Removed:**
- `#toggle-bot` button element from `index.html`.
- "Press B to toggle bot" from the on-screen controls hint in `index.html`.
- Click listener, `B`-key branch, and `toggleBot()` method from `src/main.ts`.
- The null-guard in `updateBotUI()` that referenced the now-deleted button element (leaving it would have caused the bot status display to silently stop updating).
- `toggleBot` lookup and its `.hidden` toggle from `updateModeUI()`.

**Deliberately kept:**
- `botEnabled` flag — the Solo Bot launch path still sets it; human-input suppression still reads it.
- `botEverActive` flag — leaderboard disqualification still uses it.
- `#bot-status` display — still shows the active bot's name for Solo Bot runs.

---

## Task 3 — Mid-Game Bot Switching Removed (`index.html`, `src/main.ts`, `src/style.css`)

The `#game-bot-selection` dropdown inside the live game screen allowed swapping the driving bot mid-game, inconsistent with the pre-game selection panels.

**Removed:**
- `#game-bot-selection` block (`#game-bot-select` + `#game-bot-description`) from `index.html`.
- `gameSelect` from the `botSelectors` array in `setupBotSelectors()` in `src/main.ts`; the pre-game selectors (`#bvb-bot1-select`, `#demo-bot-select`) remain wired.
- `'game-bot-description'` from `bot1Ids` in `updateBotDescriptions()`.
- `gameBotSelection` lookup and its `.hidden` toggle from `updateModeUI()`.
- Now-unused `.bot-selection` CSS rules and their responsive variant from `src/style.css`.

Bot selection is now exclusively available through the Solo Bot and Bot vs. Bot pre-game menu panels. The `#bot-status` display on the game screen still shows the active bot's name for Solo Bot runs.

---

## Task 4 — Arrow-Key Page Scroll Fix (`src/main.ts`)

On short or narrow viewports where the page overflowed, pressing arrow keys to move the snake also scrolled the browser window.

**Fix:** At the top of `handleKeyPress`, immediately after the existing guard that exempts `INPUT`/`TEXTAREA`/`SELECT` elements, an explicit `e.preventDefault()` is called for `ArrowUp`, `ArrowDown`, `ArrowLeft`, and `ArrowRight`. Prevention is applied unconditionally across all game states. WASD is unaffected (letter keys don't trigger browser scroll). Typing in forms is unaffected (exempted by the prior guard).

---

## Loop-Guard Fix (`src/bots/loop-guard.ts`)

A related bug was fixed: when a bot detected it was looping, it would enter escape mode and stay there permanently.

**Root cause:** The escape timer was reset to its full value on every tick that a valid escape move existed, so it could never count down to zero.

**Fix:** The state machine now has two independent phases:
- **Start escape** — triggered only on a fresh loop detection when no escape is already in progress.
- **Continue escape** — countdown runs for a fixed number of ticks independently of ongoing loop detection.
- **Exit escape** — when the countdown reaches zero, the visit history is cleared (preventing immediate re-detection of the same stale loop) and the bot's own direction is restored.

---

## Files Changed

| File | Changes |
|---|---|
| `src/menu-demo.ts` | Head/tail rendering, Iron Snake board support, random bot selection, label updates |
| `index.html` | Bot label element; removed `#toggle-bot` button, controls hint, `#game-bot-selection` block |
| `src/style.css` | Bot label styles; removed `.bot-selection` rules |
| `src/main.ts` | Removed toggle button/shortcut/method/UI wiring; removed mid-game selector wiring; arrow-key `preventDefault` |
| `src/bots/loop-guard.ts` | Fixed escape state machine: fresh-detection gate, fixed-duration countdown, history clear on exit |
